case_title: WILLIAM CHOY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
